actions.expression:
select
    khxj.xj_dh,
    khxj.dateis,
    khxj.khlx,
    khxj.kh_id,
    khxj.jzrq,
    khxj.bjry,
    khxj.wxbm,
    khxj.xjlb,
    khxj.shsc,
    khxj.bjbz,
    khxj.sid
from khxj
where khxj.rid in (select distinct pid from khxjsheet1 where pid=khxj.rid
  and khxjsheet1.bjry=:_user_username_)

actions.expression:
select
    khxjsheet.rid,
    khxjsheet.xjhh,
    khxjsheet.yytp,
    khxjsheet.zwpm,
    khxjsheet.ywpm,
    khxjsheet.cpgg,
    khxjsheet.nhrl,
    khxjsheet.nhwx,
    khxjsheet.wxrl,
    khxjsheet.zhwbzh,
    khxjsheet.cszl,
    khxjsheet.cz,
    khxjsheet.cpgge,
    khxjsheet.xdsl,
    khxjsheet.htxs,
    khxjsheet.jldw,
    khxjsheet.bzhfsh,
    khxjsheet.jhts,
    khxjsheet.yse,
    khxjsheet.yseew,
    khxjsheet.ks,
    khxjsheet.jsfs,
    khxjsheet.czyy2,
    khxjsheet.dw,
    khxjsheet.ywsm,
    khxjsheet.cpsm,
    khxjsheet.country,
    khxjsheet.ssdq,
    khxjsheet.zwdw,
    khxjsheet.bgjldw,
    khxjsheet.bzyq,
    khxjsheet.wypp,
    khxjsheet.ggwy,
    khxjsheet.czwy,
    khxjsheet.yswy,
    khxjsheet.wysm,
    khxjsheet.cpfl,
    khxjsheet.yjfl,
    khxjsheet.ejfl,
    khxjsheet.flmc,
    khxjsheet.cply1,
    khxjsheet.mbjg,
    khxjsheet.yjsl,
    khxjsheet.ndzs,
    khxjsheet.xjsx,
    khxjsheet.wylj,
    khxjsheet.sfbj,
    khxjsheet.bz,
    khxjsheet.bjry,
    khxjsheet.yytp1,
    khxjsheet.yytp2,
    khxjsheet.yytp3,
    khxj.xj_dh
from khxj ,khxjsheet
where
   khxj.rid=khxjsheet.pid
and khxj.xj_dh = [采购报价.询盘单号]

actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.sid,
       ozycs.cs_id,
       ozycs.company_name,
       ozycs.phone,
       ozycs.jsfs,
       ozycs.ywbf
FROM ozycs 
WHERE permission('专业工厂') 
ORDER BY ozycs.sid ASC

       ozycs.cs_id,

actions.expression:
select
    cjcp.lxm,
    cjcp.zwpm,
    cjcp.yytp,
    cjcp.ywpm,
    cjcp.gchh1,
    cjcp.yse,
    cjcp.ysez,
    cjcp.jldw,
    cjcp.zwdw,
    cjcp.bgjldw,
    cjcp.cgdj,
    cjcp.sfhs,
    cjcp.ljrk,
    cjcp.hgbm,
    cjcp.zzsl,
    cjcp.tsl,
    cjcp.nhwx,
    cjcp.zhwbzh,
    cjcp.bzhfsh,
    cjcp.bzyq,
    cjcp.mxmz,
    cjcp.mxjz,
    cjcp.cszl,
    cjcp.topcz,
    cjcp.zxcgl,
    cjcp.ks,
    cjcp.flcx,
    cjcp.cpfl,
    cjcp.yjfl,
    cjcp.ejfl,
    cjcp.sjfl,
    cjcp.flmc,
    cjcp.djpm,
    cjcp.djpmy,
    cjcp.krCODE,
    cjcp.rkdd,
    cjcp.gctd,
    cjcp.sfsq,
    cjcp.cghbdm,
    cjcp.cpggz,
    cjcp.cpgg,
    cjcp.caiziz,
    cjcp.djpmw,
    cjcp.jcxm,
    cjcp.jcfy,
    cjcp.zwcc,
    cjcp.cpsm,
    cjcp.ywsm,
    cjcp.Washing,
    cjcp.Bleach,
    cjcp.Drying,
    cjcp.Ironing,
    cjcp.sccj,
    cjcp.gcID,
    cjcp.bzcd,
    cjcp.bzkd,
    cjcp.bzgd,
    cjcp.bztj,
    cjcp.nhrl,
    cjcp.bgpm,
    cjcp.ProfessionalTextileCare,
    cjcp.cpbh
from cjcp
where  cjcp.cgry=:_user_username_ or permission('专业产品')

actions.expression:
SELECT bzhfsh.sid,bzhfsh.ywbzh 
FROM bzhfsh 
WHERE (bzhfsh.zhwbzh=[采购报价.产品资料.中文包装])

select yytp,cpbh,1 sort_id from zscp 
  where (cpbh=[采购报价.产品资料.专业货号]  and ifnull(zscp.yytp,"")<>"")

  where (cpbh=[采购报价.产品资料.专业货号] and ifnull(cjcp.yytp,"")<>"")

actions.expression:
select
    cjcp.lxm,
    cjcp.zwpm,
    cjcp.yytp,
    cjcp.ywpm,
    cjcp.gchh1,
    cjcp.yse,
    cjcp.ysez,
    cjcp.jldw,
    cjcp.zwdw,
    cjcp.bgjldw,
    cjcp.cgdj,
    cjcp.sfhs,
    cjcp.ljrk,
    cjcp.hgbm,
    cjcp.zzsl,
    cjcp.tsl,
    cjcp.nhwx,
    cjcp.zhwbzh,
    cjcp.bzhfsh,
    cjcp.bzyq,
    cjcp.mxmz,
    cjcp.mxjz,
    cjcp.cszl,
    cjcp.topcz,
    cjcp.zxcgl,
    cjcp.ks,
    cjcp.flcx,
    cjcp.cpfl,
    cjcp.yjfl,
    cjcp.ejfl,
    cjcp.sjfl,
    cjcp.flmc,
    cjcp.djpm,
    cjcp.djpmy,
    cjcp.krCODE,
    cjcp.rkdd,
    cjcp.gctd,
    cjcp.sfsq,
    cjcp.cghbdm,
    cjcp.cpggz,
    cjcp.cpgg,
    cjcp.caiziz,
    cjcp.djpmw,
    cjcp.jcxm,
    cjcp.jcfy,
    cjcp.zwcc,
    cjcp.cpsm,
    cjcp.ywsm,
    cjcp.Washing,
    cjcp.Bleach,
    cjcp.Drying,
    cjcp.Ironing,
    cjcp.sccj,
    cjcp.gcID,
    cjcp.bzcd,
    cjcp.bzkd,
    cjcp.bzgd,
    cjcp.bztj,
    cjcp.nhrl,
    cjcp.bgpm,
    cjcp.ProfessionalTextileCare,
    cjcp.cpbh
from cjcp
where  cjcp.cgry=:_user_username_ or permission('专业产品')
union all
select
    zscp.lxm,
    zscp.zwpm,
    zscp.yytp,
    zscp.ywpm,
    zscp.gchh1,
    zscp.yse,
    zscp.ysez,
    zscp.jldw,
    zscp.zwdw,
    zscp.bgjldw,
    zscp.cgdj,
    zscp.sfhs,
    zscp.ljrk,
    zscp.hgbm,
    zscp.zzsl,
    zscp.tsl,
    zscp.nhwx,
    zscp.zhwbzh,
    zscp.bzhfsh,
    zscp.bzyq,
    zscp.mxmz,
    zscp.mxjz,
    zscp.cszl,
    zscp.topcz,
    zscp.zxcgl,
    zscp.ks,
    zscp.flcx,
    zscp.cpfl,
    zscp.yjfl,
    zscp.ejfl,
    zscp.sjfl,
    zscp.flmc,
    zscp.djpm,
    zscp.djpmy,
    zscp.krCODE,
    zscp.rkdd,
    zscp.gctd,
    zscp.sfsq,
    zscp.cghbdm,
    zscp.cpggz,
    zscp.cpgg,
    zscp.caiziz,
    zscp.djpmw,
    zscp.jcxm,
    zscp.jcfy,
    zscp.zwcc,
    zscp.cpsm,
    zscp.ywsm,
    zscp.Washing,
    zscp.Bleach,
    zscp.Drying,
    zscp.Ironing,
    zscp.sccj,
    zscp.gcID,
    zscp.bzcd,
    zscp.bzkd,
    zscp.bzgd,
    zscp.bztj,
    zscp.nhrl,
    zscp.bgpm,
    zscp.ProfessionalTextileCare,
    zscp.cpbh
from zscp
where  zscp.cgry=:_user_username_ or permission('专属产品')

view.params:
SELECT khlx.khlx,khlx.SID
FROM khlx
ORDER BY khlx.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   ((ywrybiao.zw like concat("%","外销","%")) or (ywrybiao.zw like concat("%","业务","%"))) and (ywrybiao.zt<>"离职")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="询价类别")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT shsc.mc
FROM shsc
ORDER BY shsc.mc ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT cyka.ywmc,cyka.SID
FROM cyka
ORDER BY cyka.SID ASC

SELECT mdck.ckmc,mdck.SID
FROM mdck
ORDER BY mdck.SID ASC

SELECT ysfs.ysfs,ysfs.SID
FROM ysfs
ORDER BY ysfs.SID ASC

SELECT wfgs.wfgs, wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

通过
不通过

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

是
否

SELECT jldw.dwdm,jldw.SID
FROM jldw
ORDER BY jldw.SID ASC

SELECT csbg.csbg
FROM csbg
ORDER BY csbg.csbg ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(cangkuzl.dq)
FROM cangkuzl

db.default_data: 供方凭增值税发票、盖章开票合同，进仓单及3件出货样品于开船肆拾（40）日内结清。
db.name: jsfs

view.params:
SELECT ozycs.jsfs
FROM ozycs
WHERE   (ozycs.cs_id=[采购报价.产品资料.专业厂家id])

SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[采购报价.产品资料.产品大类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[采购报价.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[采购报价.产品资料.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[采购报价.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[采购报价.产品资料.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[采购报价.产品资料.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

SELECT cply.cply
FROM cply

SELECT bzyq.bzyq, bzyq.SID
FROM bzyq
ORDER BY bzyq.SID ASC

是
否

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="Washing")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="Bleach")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="Drying")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="Ironing")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="Professional Textile Care")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC
